sections.paragraph:
Ἀττάλεια, ας, ἡ (Ἀτταλία v.l., oth. edd.) Attalia, a seaport in Pamphylia Ac 14:25.—Ramsay, Hist. Geogr. 420.

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

edd. edd. = editions, editors

Ramsay, Hist. Geogr. Ramsay, Hist. Geogr. = The Historical Geography of Asia Minor

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 149
